title: UP BEd JEE Admit Card 2026 Out

detail.title: UP BEd JEE Admit Card 2026 Out
detail.short_info: UP BEd JEE Admit Card 2026 out for the Uttar Pradesh BEd Joint Entrance Examination on the official websites - bujhansi.ac.in and cdn3.digialm.com. Check the direct link here and follow the steps to download the UP BEd JEE hall ticket 2026 using user ID and password.

sections.heading: UP BEd JEE Admit Card 2026 Out

content.text: Bundelkhand University, Jhansi has released the UP BEd JEE Admit Card 2026 for the Uttar Pradesh BEd Joint Entrance Examination 2026. The admit card has been issued online for all registered candidates and is now available on the official university website and the Digialm candidate login portal.

As per the official schedule, the UP BEd JEE 2026 entrance exam will be conducted on 31 May 2026 at various exam centres across Uttar Pradesh. Candidates must download and print their UP BEd JEE admit card 2026 from bujhansi.ac.in.
Direct Link to Download UP BEd JEE Admit Card 2026 Here

links.text: Direct Link to Download UP BEd JEE Admit Card 2026 Here

sections.heading: UP BEd JEE Admit Card 2026 - Key Details

headers: Uttar Pradesh BEd Joint Entrance Examination (UP BEd JEE) 2026
rows: Admission to 2-year BEd programmes in colleges and universities across Uttar Pradesh
UP BEd JEE Admit Card 2026 out in online mode
bujhansi.ac.in → UP BEd JEE 2026 → Download Admit Card
User ID / Registration Number and Password, followed by OTP on registered mobile (if asked)

sections.heading: How to Download UP BEd JEE Admit Card 2026

content.text: Follow these steps to download the UP BEd JEE Admit Card 2026:

items: Visit the official website of Bundelkhand University: bujhansi.ac.in.
On the homepage, click on “UP B.Ed JEE 2026” or the “Download Admit Card” link.
You will be redirected to the Digialm candidate login page (cdn3.digialm.com/EForms/configuredHtml/1936/97469/login.html) or a similar login interface.
Enter your User ID / registration number and password, then submit the captcha if displayed.
If prompted, enter the OTP sent to your registered mobile number to verify your login.
Click on “View / Download Admit Card”; your UP BEd JEE Admit Card 2026 will appear on the screen with your exam date, time and centre details.
Check all the details carefully and download and print 2–3 clear A4-size copies of the hall ticket for exam day and future reference.

content.text: Admit cards are available only online; no hard copy will be sent by post.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on UP BEd JEE Admit Card 2026

content.text: The UP BEd JEE Admit Card 2026 carries important exam and candidate information that must be checked carefully before the entrance test. Typically, the following details are printed on the hall ticket:

items: Candidate’s name, photograph and signature
Registration number / application number and roll number (if allotted)
Exam name: UP BEd Joint Entrance Examination (UP BEd JEE) 2026
Exam date, reporting time and exam timing for the paper
Exam centre code, exam centre name, city and complete address
Category and sub-category (if applicable) and other basic details
Instructions regarding permissible items, reporting time and exam-day conduct
Any special remark / provision (such as PwD category, scribe facility or special instructions, if applicable)

content.text: If any mismatch or error is noticed in your personal details, photograph, category, exam date or exam centre details, you should contact the official UP BEd JEE helpdesk / Bundelkhand University, Jhansi, immediately before the exam for clarification and necessary correction.

sections.heading: Documents Required with UP BEd JEE Admit Card 2026

content.text: On the day of the UP BEd JEE 2026 examination, candidates should carry:

items: A printed copy of the UP BEd JEE Admit Card 2026 (clear A4-size printout; colour or good-quality black and white).
One original valid photo ID proof, such as Aadhaar Card, PAN Card, Passport, Voter ID, Driving Licence or any other government-issued ID accepted as per UP BEd JEE instructions.

Any additional documents mentioned in the admit card or information brochure (for example, PwD certificate and scribe permission letter if you are availing a scribe facility, or other documents specified by the conducting university).

content.text: Entry to the exam centre will not be allowed without the printed UP BEd JEE admit card and a valid photo ID.

sections.heading: Exam-Day Instructions for UP BEd JEE Admit Card 2026

content.text: To ensure smooth conduct of the UP BEd Joint Entrance Examination 2026, candidates should follow these guidelines:

items: Reach the exam centre well before the reporting time printed on the UP BEd JEE admit card so that verification, frisking and seating can be completed; late entry after the scheduled time or gate-closing time may not be allowed.

Carry only essential items: UP BEd JEE Admit Card 2026 (A4 printout), valid photo ID and basic permitted stationery such as pens, pencils etc., as per the exam instructions; follow all specific directions printed on the admit card.

Do not carry mobile phones, smart watches, calculators (if not permitted), Bluetooth devices, earphones, written notes, books or any other electronic gadgets or paper material inside the examination hall; violation may lead to cancellation of your paper and further disciplinary action.

Follow all instructions printed on the UP BEd JEE admit card and those announced by the invigilators during the exam; indulging in unfair means, talking to other candidates or disobeying exam rules can result in cancellation of your examination and possible debarment from future entrance tests.

Keep your UP BEd JEE Admit Card 2026 safely even after the exam, as it may be required later for result reference, counselling, seat allotment and document verification during admission to BEd colleges in Uttar Pradesh.

short_info: UP BEd JEE Admit Card 2026 out for the Uttar Pradesh BEd Joint Entrance Examination on the official websites - bujhansi.ac.in and cdn3.digialm.com. Check the direct link here and follow the steps to download the UP BEd JEE hall ticket 2026 using user ID and password.
